papers.title: Overcoming Core Engineering Barriers in Humanoid Robotics Development
papers.title_zh: Overcoming Core Engineering Barriers in Humanoid Robotics Development
papers.tldr_zh: A technical examination of the sensing, motion control, powe
papers.cover_zh: A technical examination of the sensing, motion control, powe
papers.abstract_zh: A technical examination of the sensing, motion control, power, and thermal challenges facing humanoid robotics engineers — with component-level design strategies for real-world deployment. What Attendees will Learn Why motion control remains the hardest unsolved problem — Explore the modelling complexity, real-time feedback requirements, and sensor fusion demands of maintaining stable biped
